title: Silk Frames
description: This modpack is designed to make Minecraft smoother and more responsive, improving performance while keeping the vanilla feel intact. Perfect for a better gameplay experience.
body:
# ⬆️ Created to maximize game performance

This modpack is designed for those who want to improve Minecraft performance, making the experience smoother and more fluid without sacrificing the aesthetics of the game. Perfect for those looking for optimized gameplay, this pack aims to reduce lag, increase framerate and improve stability, ideal for mid-range and low-end PCs as well.

## ❓ How it works

Using a selection of optimization mods, this modpack optimizes every aspect of the game, from graphics rendering to memory management to chunk loading settings. It includes the best performance mods that increase efficiency, ensuring a stable and well-balanced environment. The result is a fast, snappy, and reliable gaming experience.
![Vanilla VS Silked](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba2794cfe8c7de7153f43127de631981e013a28e.png)

## ⭐️ Special Features

In addition to optimization, this modpack introduces a range of visual improvements and features that enhance the gameplay experience, making it more **intuitive and seamless**. The interface is designed to ensure visual comfort, while additional tools **simplify the management of textures, sounds, and settings**.

From improved visual clarity to streamlined inventory and command handling, every element is crafted to provide a smoother, more personalized experience, with a **focus on efficiency and convenience**.

![Shader Support](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/77d2865cb76be01a7a6e6fc1a0b47f1c50649232.png)

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**And much more** to ensure personalized and immersive gameplay.

Check out this modpack's collection: [here](https://modrinth.com/collection/vVHaWZay)

# 🛠️ Available Versions

### 🧰 Silk Frame

The main version of the modpack, designed to optimize Minecraft and improve performance without altering the base gameplay experience, with a focus on **total optimization**.

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### ♻️ Silk Frames Lite

A lighter and more minimalist version of the modpack, designed for lower-end machines and **optimized to take up less space**, ensuring maximum performance with the minimum necessary mods.

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### ⚔️ Silk Frames PVP

A variant **designed for PvP**, including useful mods for combat, such as details on totems and support for crystal-PvP, while maintaining the performance of the base version.

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### ⭐ My Silk Frames

A customized version that retains the optimizations of the base modpack and **adds over 50 mods** for extra features like waypoints and enhanced HUD, sacrificing some performance for the additional mods, designed for higher-end machines.

# ❓ FAQ

### 📂 Using Parts of This Modpack

Regarding parts created by me, whether they are resource-packs, mods, shaders, or any other elements, proper credit must be given when using them. This means that you must clearly credit the original creator (myself) and provide a visible link to the official Modrinth page where the content can be downloaded.

Please note that components not created by me are not managed or supported by me, and any issues or requests related to those should be addressed to their respective creators.

This applies to all uses, including streaming, video content, and any form of public content creation. Proper attribution ensures the recognition of the original work and allows others to discover and explore the modpack.

### 📦 Using the Entire Modpack

You are allowed to use the entire modpack publicly, including in projects, servers, or other public uses. While proper credit to the original creator (myself) with a visible link to the official Modrinth page is **strongly appreciated** when the modpack is used in full, it is not strictly required. However, this does not grant permission to re-upload or redistribute the modpack on any platform or website without explicit consent.

Any attempt to republish the modpack as your own or distribute it through unauthorized channels is strictly prohibited. If you wish to modify or share the modpack in any way, please contact me for approval. The goal is to ensure that the modpack remains under proper control and that all creators are respected for their work.

### ⚖️ Consequences of Non-Compliance

Failure to respect these guidelines may initially result in a polite request for compliance. However, if these conditions are not followed, it will lead to the total removal of the content in question.

# 🌐 Credits

### 📜 Resource Packs

- **Glowing textures**: "Notice me!" by _Meteorfire_ - [Modrinth page](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/notice-me)
- **Visual stews**: "Visual Stews" by _Meteorfire_ - [Modrinth page](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/visual-stews)
- **Clear Glass**: "Clear Glass" by _Meteorfire_ - [Modrinth page](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/clear-glass)

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

- **Enchanted books' textures**: "Even Better Enchants" by _mythitorium_ - [Modrinth page](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/even-better-enchants)
- **Sodium's translations**: "Translations for Sodium" by _robotkoer_ and _FlashyReese_ - [Modrinth page](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/translations-for-sodium)
- **Dark mode GUI**: "Default Dark Mode" by _nebulr_ - [Modrinth page](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/default-dark-mode)

### 🧮 Mods
- **LAN server hosting**: "e4mc" by _vgskye_ - [Modrinth page](https://modrinth.com/mod/e4mc)
- **Zoom**: "Zoomify" by _isxander_ - [Modrinth page](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify)
- **Sound personalization**: "Sound Controller" by _BVengo_ - [Modrinth page](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-controller)
- **Keybinds search**: "Controlling" by _jaredlll08_ - [Modrinth page](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlling)
- **Colored subtitles**: "Colorful Subtitles" by _haykam_ - [Modrinth page](https://modrinth.com/mod/colorful-subtitles)

### 📸 Gallery
All photos using shaders in the gallery where taken using

"Complementary Shaders - Reimagined" by _EminGT_ - [Modrinth page](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined)

To visualize the resoure-packs' features you can go to their Modrinth page as linked above.

### 🎲 More
Additional credits can simply be found in the **_Dependencies_** Tab.

# 🎚 Specs used during testing
## 🖥 PC
- **CPU**: Intel i5-10600
- **GPU**: Nvidia Geforce RTX 2070 super 8GB VRAM
- **RAM**: DDR4 16GB

## 🌍 Minecraft Settings
- **Graphics**: Faboulous!
- **Rendering distance**: 32
- **Simulation distance**: 32
- **Shadows distance (without shaders)**: 32
- **Shaders setting**: Very High, _Ubound_ Sun/Moon, _Reimagined + Waves_ Water
- **V-sync**: OFF
- **Resolution**: 2560x1440
